hero.description: PhileCoders builds reliable web apps, mobile products, and digital platforms that help businesses scale without the overhead.

aboutPreview.heading: A Team That
aboutPreview.description: We're a lean crew of senior engineers and designers who've shipped products for startups and Fortune 500s alike. No fluff — just clean code, honest timelines, and software that works.

highlights.label: Secure by Default
highlights.desc: Security baked in from day one

reasons.desc: Two-week sprints with working software every cycle. No endless planning phases.

reasons.title: Senior-only Team
reasons.desc: Every project is handled by senior engineers — no juniors learning on your dime.

cta.heading: Ready to Build Something Great?
cta.subheading: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. We'll listen to your goals and recommend the right approach — no commitment required.

process.title: Discovery
process.desc: Free 30-min call to understand your goals, constraints, and timeline. No commitment required.

process.title: Proposal
process.desc: Clear scope, fixed price or team rate, and a realistic timeline delivered within 48 hours.

process.title: Build
process.desc: Two-week sprints with working software every cycle. Daily async updates, weekly video syncs.

process.title: Launch & Beyond
process.desc: We handle deployment, monitoring, and a 30-day post-launch warranty. Ongoing support available.

faq.q: How long does a typical project take?
faq.a: Most web apps take 6–12 weeks from kickoff to launch. Mobile apps typically 8–14 weeks. We'll give you a precise estimate after the discovery call.

faq.q: Do you work with early-stage startups?
faq.a: Absolutely. We've helped many founders go from idea to funded product. We offer MVP-focused scopes designed to validate fast and stay within budget.
Projects start from $8,000 for a focused MVP. Most full-featured apps range from $20,000–$60,000. We offer fixed-price and dedicated-team models.

faq.q: Who owns the code after the project?
faq.a: You do. Upon final payment, all IP transfers to you. We sign an IP assignment agreement as part of every contract.

faq.q: Can you work with our existing codebase?
faq.a: Yes. We regularly join projects mid-stream — auditing existing code, adding features, or refactoring for scale. We'll do a code review before committing.

faq.q: Do you offer ongoing maintenance after launch?
faq.a: Yes. We offer monthly retainer plans for maintenance, monitoring, and feature development. All projects include a 30-day bug-fix warranty at no extra cost.

services.heading: Services That
services.subheading: End‑to‑end development, from idea to live product. We stick with you through launch and beyond.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Custom web apps and marketing sites built with React, Next.js, and a focus on performance and SEO.
items.longDescription: We build fast, accessible, and SEO-optimised web applications using the latest React and Next.js patterns. From landing pages to complex SaaS dashboards, every project is crafted with clean code, responsive design, and production-grade performance in mind.

items.title: Mobile Apps
items.description: Cross‑platform iOS & Android apps using React Native or Flutter, with smooth native feel.
items.longDescription: We ship polished iOS and Android apps from a single codebase using React Native or Flutter. Our mobile apps are built for performance, offline support, and seamless app-store submission — with full QA on real devices.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.description: User‑centered design from wireframes to high‑fidelity prototypes, validated with real user feedback.
items.longDescription: Great software starts with great design. We run discovery workshops, build wireframes, and deliver pixel-perfect Figma prototypes that your developers can implement directly. Every design decision is backed by user research and accessibility standards.

items.title: Backend & APIs
items.description: Reliable serverless or containerized backends with REST or GraphQL APIs that scale with your traffic.
items.longDescription: We architect and build backends that are secure, observable, and ready to scale. Whether you need a simple REST API or a complex event-driven microservices system, we choose the right tool for your traffic and budget.

items.title: Cloud & DevOps
items.description: Automated CI/CD pipelines, AWS and GCP infrastructure, and monitoring so your app runs 24/7.
items.longDescription: We set up the infrastructure so your team can ship confidently. From zero-downtime deployments to cost-optimised cloud architecture, we handle the ops so you can focus on product.

items.title: Performance Tuning
items.description: Site audits, Core Web Vitals optimization, and caching strategies that improve load times and SEO.
items.longDescription: Slow sites lose users and rankings. We audit your existing application, identify bottlenecks, and implement targeted fixes — from image optimisation and code splitting to CDN configuration and database query tuning.

intro.heading: Small Team,
intro.description: We're a lean team of senior engineers and designers who've worked with both startups and Fortune 500s. We believe in clean code, honest timelines, and products that solve real problems.

story.heading: How We
paragraphs: PhileCoders was founded in 2018 by a group of engineers frustrated with agencies that over-promised and under-delivered. We set out to build a different kind of software company — one where senior talent does the actual work, timelines are honest, and clients are treated as partners.

Over six years we've grown from a two-person consultancy to a tight-knit team of twelve, shipping everything from early-stage MVPs to enterprise-grade platforms. We've stayed deliberately small so every client gets our best work.
Today we work with founders, product teams, and CTOs across North America and Europe. Our model is simple: understand the problem deeply, build the right solution, and stand behind it after launch.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To build software that solves real problems — delivered on time, on budget, and built to last. We measure success by the outcomes our clients achieve, not just the code we ship.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: A world where every great idea gets the engineering talent it deserves. We want to be the team that turns ambitious visions into reliable, scalable products — regardless of company size.

values.label: Client First
values.desc: Every decision starts with what's best for the client.

values.label: Craft
values.desc: We take pride in clean, well-tested, maintainable code.

values.label: Transparency
values.desc: No surprises. Honest updates, even when it's bad news.

values.label: Speed
values.desc: We move fast without cutting corners on quality.

items.text: PhileCoders didn't just build our dashboard — they helped us rethink the user experience. The performance under heavy load is outstanding. We've already renewed for a second phase.

items.name: Priya K.
